parentQuestion: A newly developed antibiotic specifically targets bacterial ribosomes without af...

scaffolds.q: Ribosomes are responsible for making ___ using mRNA as a template.
scaffolds.explain: Ribosomes synthesize proteins by reading mRNA and linking amino acids in the correct sequence. They're molecular 3D printers, darling. Keep pace with this:.

scaffolds.q: Bacteria are ___ cells, meaning they lack a membrane-bound nucleus.
scaffolds.explain: Prokaryotic cells (bacteria) lack a membrane-bound nucleus — their DNA floats freely in the cytoplasm. Eukaryotic cells (like yours) have a nucleus. Pro = before, karyon = nucleus. Simple as that.
